title: 4Pcs Velvet Poinsettia Stems with Glitter Edge, Artificial Christmas Flower Picks for Christmas Tree Decoration Vase Filler Wreath Garland Crafts Holiday Wedding Home Décor (Champagne)
features: Premium Quality: These 4 velvet poinsettia stems feature glittered edges for an elegant touch, perfect for Christmas tree decoration, vase fillers, wreath garlands, and festive home décor.
Versatile Design: The artificial Christmas flower picks can be used for various crafts, holiday weddings, and decorative arrangements.
Realistic Appearance: The poinsettia stems boast a lifelike velvet texture and vibrant colours, adding a touch of natural beauty to your seasonal displays.
Convenient Size: Each stem measures approximately 22 cm in length and 20 cm in diameter, making them easy to incorporate into various decorative projects.
Long-Lasting: Unlike fresh flowers, these artificial poinsettia stems retain their beauty for years, allowing you to enjoy their festive charm season after season.
description: Bring the festive spirit of Christmas into your home décor with these exquisite 4Pcs Velvet Poinsettia Stems with Glitter Edge. These artificial Christmas flower picks are perfect for adorning your Christmas tree, vase, wreath, garland, or any holiday arrangement. Crafted from high-quality velvet material with a shimmering glitter edge, these poinsettia stems exude elegance and sophistication. Measuring approximately 20 cm in diameter, the length of the stick is approximately 22cm, they are the ideal size for creating stunning floral displays. Whether you use them as a centrepiece on your dining table or incorporate them into your festive decorations, these poinsettia stems will add a touch of warmth and cheer to your holiday celebrations. Effortlessly elevate your Christmas décor with these versatile and long-lasting artificial flower picks.
